name: Abnormality of refraction
description: An abnormality in the process of focusing of light by the eye in order to produce a sharp image on the retina.

name: nuclear ubiquitin ligase complex
description: "A ubiquitin ligase complex found in the nucleus." [GOC:mah]

name: PRC1 complex
description: "A multiprotein complex that mediates monoubiquitination of lysine residues of histone H2A (lysine-118 in Drosophila or lysine-119 in mammals). The complex is required for stable long-term maintenance of transcriptionally repressed states and is involved in chromatin remodeling." [GOC:bf, PMID:10412979]
